c.d: Maximum number of contacts or messages that can be broadcast at once
Compatibility with other software and services for streamlined communication
c.s: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, Rocket.Chat

c.d: Level of user-friendliness and simplicity in sending broadcast messages
Types of messages supported such as SMS, MMS, multimedia, links, or interactive content
Availability of real-time analytics to monitor message delivery and engagement
Level of encryption and privacy measures implemented
Tools for managing contact groups, segmentation, and message targeting
Capability to schedule messages and automate follow-ups
c.s: Mobile Text Alerts, EZ Texting, Text-Em-All

c.d: Support for sending photos, videos, voice, and other media types
Availability on multiple devices such as iOS, Android, Windows, Mac
